Mini Polish Report

Voice

Detected voice: direct and concise. Preset: preserve voice. The doc uses an active register with short sentences averaging 18 words.

Rubric Results

14 checks run. 3 failed: em-dash density, lede-buried, hedging stack. 11 passed. Estimated work: ~4 LLM calls, ~20s.

Rollout

Ship per-skill contract tests before flipping the resolver on. Each of the 14 originating skills owns its own shim under scripts/.
